subcodes.first_line: O ancient and faithful friend! In the Arabic tongue, 'dinar' signifieth pure gold. Praise be to God, thou too art indeed a dinar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین و آئین دینار در لغت تازی زر خالص را گویند تو نیزالحمد لله دینار
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
